data.title: Today, the Price of an Altcoin Surged Suddenly Following the U.S.’s Shocking Ban on Anthropic
data.summary: TAO rose over 13% after US export controls restricted Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models, reigniting debates on centralized AI risks.

content: TAO gained over 13% following a new export control directive from the US government restricting access to Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models.
According to Anthropic, the US government has issued an export control directive suspending access to the Fable 5 and Mythos 5 games for all foreign nationals
summary: TAO rose over 13% after US export controls restricted Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models, reigniting debates on centralized AI risks.
